holdings.infoBox: GVLE is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 6.04%, Alphabet at 5.77%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 4.87%, Chevron at 4.30%, and Amazon.com at 4.15%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Value Opportunities ETF (GVLE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF, investing in US companies considered to be undervalued. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through fundamental stock selection. GVLE was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
